motion.name: blur-up
motion.purpose: Soft entrance for support copy and media.

brandGrid.purpose: Quiet technical workshop texture for hero sections, social quote posts, carousel covers and story covers.
brandGrid.css: background-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.06) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.06) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 36px 36px;
usage: Use on Warm Ash Cream or Warm Paper backgrounds.
Use behind hero copy and social posts that need a website-linked texture.
Keep low contrast; do not recolor teal or place over busy imagery.

channels.name: LinkedIn feed square
channels.useFor: Single insight, quote, proof cue or CTA-led post.

channels.name: LinkedIn feed portrait
channels.useFor: Mini-frameworks, case-study proof and short educational posts.

channels.name: Instagram square
channels.useFor: One decisive idea with strong typography.

channels.name: Instagram story or reel cover
channels.useFor: Story title cards, reel covers and vertical promotional graphics.

copyPatterns.name: Problem insight
copyPatterns.pattern: Start with a concrete friction point, then name the clearer next step.
copyPatterns.example: Je website voelt niet traag door een detail. Vaak mist de hele flow richting actie.

copyPatterns.name: Practical contrast
copyPatterns.example: Niet meer pagina's. Wel betere keuzes per pagina.

copyPatterns.name: Process proof
copyPatterns.pattern: Show what happens within 48 hours or in the first step.
copyPatterns.example: Binnen 48 uur weet je welke stap logisch is: verbeteren, herwerken of opnieuw bouwen.

layoutRecipes.name: Insight post
layoutRecipes.structure: Small uppercase label, oversized Bespoke headline, one DM Sans support line, small upshift wordmark.
layoutRecipes.palette: Warm Ash Cream background, Ink Brown text, one Signal Teal line or dot.

layoutRecipes.name: Carousel cover
layoutRecipes.structure: Pillar label, big payoff headline, slide count marker, restrained teal underline.
layoutRecipes.palette: Warm Paper or Ink Brown background with high contrast text.

layoutRecipes.name: Case-study proof
layoutRecipes.structure: Before/after tension, one screenshot or project crop, short lesson, small CTA.
layoutRecipes.palette: Warm background with dark image overlay or Ink Brown proof band.

rules: Use one strong message per social asset.
Use Signal Teal for one action, proof cue or divider only.
Use the Brand Grid as a subtle warm-background texture when an asset needs a clear website connection.
Keep important text inside the safe area.
Prefer real screenshots, project crops and workshop imagery over stock.
Do not use pure white, generic SaaS gradients, robot AI imagery, high-contrast grid backgrounds or oversized metric-template posts.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; background: #06c2a4; color: #16110f; padding: 0.95rem 1.4rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(6, 194, 164, 0.25); transition: background-color 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #049e86; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 16px 34px rgba(6, 194, 164, 0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #06c2a4; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; border: 1px solid rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.12); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; background: #fffcf7; color: #16110f; padding: 0.95rem 1.4rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; box-shadow: 0 10px 22px rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.05); transition: background-color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, transform 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.24); background: #f3ede3; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #06c2a4; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Warm translucent container for service, testimonial and content surfaces.
components.html:
Aanpak

Duidelijk van intake tot launch

Een warm oppervlak met subtiele lift, bedoeld om inhoud te dragen zonder de pagina te verzwaren.
components.css: .ds-surface-card { border: 1px solid rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.12); border-radius: 32px; background: rgba(255, 252, 247, 0.82); color: #16110f; padding: 2rem; box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.04); font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-surface-card h3 { margin: 0.75rem 0 0; font-family: 'Bespoke Slab Variable', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 1.875rem; line-height: 1.15; font-weight: 600; } .ds-surface-card p { color: #5f5751; line-height: 1.7; } .ds-label { margin: 0; color: #06c2a4; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Header navigation item with restrained teal underline feedback.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; cursor: pointer; color: #5f5751; padding-bottom: 2px; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; transition: color 180ms ease; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: -2px; width: 100%; height: 2px; background: #06c2a4; border-radius: 1px; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: right; transition: transform 260ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #16110f; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); transform-origin: left; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #06c2a4; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Project Chip
components.description: Small metadata tag used on image-backed project cards.
components.css: .ds-project-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88); padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Social Quote Post
components.description: Square LinkedIn or Instagram post for a practical quote, insight or objection.
components.html:
Digitale duidelijkheid

Niet meer pagina's. Wel betere keuzes per pagina.

upshift · websites, webshops en AI
components.css: .ds-social-quote { width: 1080px; height: 1080px; box-sizing: border-box; background-color: #f8f5ef; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.06) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.06) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 36px 36px; color: #16110f; padding: 108px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border: 1px solid rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.12); } .ds-social-quote::before { content: ''; width: 112px; height: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #06c2a4; display: block; } .ds-social-label { margin: 0; color: #5f5751; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-social-quote h1 { max-width: 790px; margin: 0; font-family: 'Bespoke Slab Variable', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 96px; line-height: 0.98; letter-spacing: -0.04em; font-weight: 700; } .ds-social-foot { margin: 0; color: #5f5751; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Carousel Cover
components.description: Carousel opening slide with one clear payoff and slide count.
components.css: .ds-carousel-cover { width: 1080px; height: 1080px; box-sizing: border-box; background: #16110f; color: #f8f5ef; padding: 96px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-carousel-cover p { margin: 0 0 34px; color: #06c2a4; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-carousel-cover h1 { max-width: 800px; margin: 0; font-family: 'Bespoke Slab Variable', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 86px; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.04em; font-weight: 700; } .ds-carousel-cover span { align-self: flex-end; border: 1px solid rgba(248, 245, 239, 0.24); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 14px 22px; color: rgba(248, 245, 239, 0.78); font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Carousel Content Slide
components.description: Educational carousel slide with one numbered point.
components.html:
02

Maak de volgende stap zichtbaar

Een bezoeker beslist sneller wanneer de actie logisch voelt en weinig risico vraagt.

upshift
components.css: .ds-carousel-slide { width: 1080px; height: 1080px; box-sizing: border-box; background-color: #fffcf7; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.045) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.045) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 36px 36px; color: #16110f; padding: 96px; display: grid; grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; border: 1px solid rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.12); } .ds-step { margin: 0; color: #06c2a4; font-family: 'Bespoke Slab Variable', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 112px; line-height: 1; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.04em; } .ds-carousel-slide div { align-self: center; max-width: 760px; } .ds-carousel-slide h2 { margin: 0; font-family: 'Bespoke Slab Variable', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 72px; line-height: 1.04; letter-spacing: -0.035em; font-weight: 700; } .ds-carousel-slide p:not(.ds-step):not(.ds-brand) { margin: 34px 0 0; color: #5f5751; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-brand { justify-self: end; margin: 0; color: #5f5751; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Case Study Proof Post
components.description: Portrait social post that frames a before/after problem and one practical lesson.
components.html:
Projectbeeld

Case-study proof

Van onduidelijke flow naar meer vertrouwen in de volgende stap.

Bespreek je project
components.css: .ds-case-proof { width: 1200px; height: 1500px; box-sizing: border-box; background: #f8f5ef; color: #16110f; padding: 96px; display: grid; grid-template-rows: 48% 1fr; gap: 54px; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-case-media { border-radius: 32px; border: 1px solid rgba(22, 17, 15, 0.12); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f3ede3, #fffcf7); display: grid; place-items: center; color: #5f5751; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-case-copy p { margin: 0 0 28px; color: #06c2a4; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-case-copy h1 { margin: 0; font-family: 'Bespoke Slab Variable', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 74px; line-height: 1.02; letter-spacing: -0.04em; font-weight: 700; } .ds-case-copy span { display: inline-flex; margin-top: 44px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #06c2a4; color: #16110f; padding: 18px 28px; font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Story Cover
components.description: Vertical Instagram story or reel cover with protected bottom CTA area.
components.html:
AI-workflows

Automatiseer pas wanneer het proces helder is.

Binnen 48 uur een volgende stap
components.css: .ds-story-cover { position: relative; width: 1080px; height: 1920px; box-sizing: border-box; background: #16110f; color: #f8f5ef; padding: 180px 96px 240px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 52px; font-family: 'DM Sans', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; } .ds-story-cover::before { content: 'upshift'; position: absolute; left: 96px; top: 96px; color: rgba(248, 245, 239, 0.58); font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-story-cover p { margin: 0; color: #06c2a4; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-story-cover h1 { margin: 0; max-width: 820px; font-family: 'Bespoke Slab Variable', Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 104px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: -0.045em; font-weight: 700; } .ds-story-cover span { display: inline-flex; align-self: flex-start; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f8f5ef; color: #16110f; padding: 20px 30px; font-size: 28px; font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview: The upshift interface should feel like a focused project table: warm, bright, technically precise and easy to enter. The brand sells clarity and speed, so the design uses generous space, strong display typography, concise copy and direct action paths.
keyCharacteristics: Warm off-white base with deep brown text and disciplined teal actions.
Large expressive headlines balanced by compact, readable body copy.
CSS-first motion that supports perceived quality without slowing the page.
Social media assets use one strong message, one proof cue and one restrained brand mark.

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Teal is for action, focus and proof. Do not expand it into a full teal theme.

rules.name: The Feed Contrast Rule
rules.body: Social posts may use Ink Brown as a full background, but keep a warm surface or warm text block in the composition.

rules.name: The Grid Texture Rule
rules.body: The Brand Grid uses 1px warm-brown lines on a 36px rhythm. Use it as a subtle warm-background texture, never as a loud decorative pattern.

rules.name: The Quiet Body Rule
rules.body: If a paragraph is doing the same work as its heading, cut it or make it more concrete.

rules.name: The Social Headline Rule
rules.body: Social graphics need one dominant line, usually 5 to 10 words, supported by one proof cue or next step.

dos: Do use Signal Teal for primary action, focus and proof cues.
Do keep the page warm, bright and legible with Warm Ash Cream and Ink Brown.
Do keep motion transform-based and respectful of prefers-reduced-motion.
Do make social posts feel like website fragments: warm surface, strong type, one teal signal and a clear idea.
Do write Dutch/Flemish B2B social copy by default.
Do use the Brand Grid on warm hero-style social backgrounds when the asset needs a clear website connection.
donts: Don't use generic AI-template esthetiek, paarse SaaS-gradients or neon-on-black category reflexes.
Don't create card-in-card layouts or endless identical card grids.
Don't use decorative glassmorphism as the default surface treatment.
Don't use pure white social backgrounds.
Don't create social posts around oversized standalone metrics without context.
Don't use stock-looking business imagery, generic robot AI graphics or floating dashboard mockups disconnected from upshift's real work.
Don't make the Brand Grid high-contrast, teal or layered over busy imagery.
